name: Hess 定律与键能
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 反应性 1 · 热力学 Reactivity 1 · What Drives Chemical Reactions
curriculum_points: State Hess's Law and use it to calculate enthalpy changes from provided data, including constructing and using enthalpy cycles (AO2).
Calculate approximate enthalpy changes from average bond enthalpy data, and explain why such values may differ from those determined using Hess's Law (AO2, AO3).

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「Hess 定律与键能」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：State Hess's Law and use it to calculate enthalpy changes from provided data, including constructing and using enthalpy …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Calculate approximate enthalpy changes from average bond enthalpy data, and expl… 对理解「Hess 定律与键能」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
